The '''Deluxe Boarding Armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Environment suit/Legends|space suit]] manufactured and sold by [[Wrokix Works]]. Sometimes called [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetrooper]] armor, models typically came equipped with self-healing patch systems, multiple respiration systems, [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]], and armor plating to prevent possible breaches.
